title: eMule BB release campaign template
description: Strict release-test taxonomy owned by eMule BB for current and future releases.

phases.title: Preflight
phases.intent: Fast local confidence, workspace policy, buildability, and unit-level harness checks.

phases.title: Protocol parity
phases.intent: Kad/eD2K compatibility, native protocol coverage, community comparison, and live-diff signal.

phases.title: Controller surface
phases.intent: REST, Web/API compatibility, aMuTorrent, and Arr controller integration coverage.

phases.title: Live-wire release
phases.intent: Operator-owned real-network search, transfer, UI, weak-path, and external integration proof.

phases.title: UI resource depth
phases.intent: Release language/resource coverage and deep UI smoke for release-facing controls.

phases.title: Stabilization stress
phases.intent: Optional extended resource, crash, leak, concurrency, and dump evidence.

phases.title: Packaging provenance
phases.intent: Release packages, architecture coverage, hashes, manifests, and clean source provenance.
